title: Create GitHub repos for all 100 products
description: Automated script creating all 100 BlackRoad product repos in BlackRoad-OS organization. Running in background. Each repo has: description, topics, public visibility. Categories: Education (3), DevOps (18), Creator (10), AI (8), Business (15), Health (4), Security (4), Media (5), Governance (8), Backend (10), Operations (6). Script: /tmp/create-github-repos-for-all-products.sh
